name: refine-writing-extension
title: Refine Writing
description: Refine your writing with Gemini CLI. Select text, press a hotkey, get polished output instantly.
author: ari

commands.name: refine-with-options
commands.title: Refine Writing
commands.subtitle: Refine Writing
commands.description: Pick text from selection or clipboard history, choose tone and context, then refine with Gemini.

commands.name: switch-skill
commands.title: Sync Skill to Gemini CLI
commands.subtitle: Refine Writing
commands.description: Pick a source skill folder and sync it to your Gemini CLI skill.

preferences.name: defaultTone
preferences.title: Default Tone
preferences.description: The default tone to use when refining text.

preferences.name: geminiPath
preferences.title: Gemini CLI Path
preferences.description: Path to the gemini CLI binary. Leave empty to use the default.

preferences.name: skillPath
preferences.title: Default Skill Folder
preferences.description: Path to the default source skill folder containing SKILL.md.

preferences.name: skillSourceRoot
preferences.title: Skills Source Root
preferences.description: Directory to scan for source skill folders (each must contain SKILL.md).

preferences.name: geminiSkillRoot
preferences.title: Gemini CLI Skills Root
preferences.description: Directory to scan for Gemini CLI skill folders (destinations).
